parameters.content:
## 🤖 NEURA Meeting Agent
**Click ▶ Test Workflow to run**

1. Reads meeting transcript
2. GPT-4o reasons over content
3. Checks for recurring blockers
4. Schedules follow-up meeting
5. Sends personalised action emails
6. Human-in-the-Loop for external meetings

⚠️ To approve after pause:
Copy `resume_url` from the
Approval Required node output
and open it in your browser

## 👤 Human-in-the-Loop
Only fires when **external**
**participants** are detected.

Agent PAUSES and waits for
explicit human approval before
distributing anything outside
the organisation.

## ⚡ Internal Path
No external participants detected.
Agent auto-executes all actions
without human intervention.

options.systemMessage:
=You are the NEURA Robotics AI Meeting Agent — an enterprise agent that turns meeting transcripts into structured actions.

You have three tools. Use ALL of them before responding:
- check_blocker_history: call for every blocker or delay mentioned
- schedule_followup_meeting: call if a follow-up meeting was agreed
- send_action_email: call once per unique action item owner. Pass: recipient_name, recipient_email, task, deadline, priority, meeting_title, follow_up_date

IMPORTANT — capturing action items:
- Capture EVERY commitment made by any attendee, including implied ones
- If someone says 'I will do X once I receive Y', that is an action item with a depends_on
- If someone says 'once you have X, how long for Y?' and gets a deadline answer, that is an action item
- Do NOT miss any person who made a commitment
- For depends_on: write the specific dependency (e.g. 'Thomas Becker delivers API documentation by 2026-06-06') or null if none

After using your tools, return ONLY a raw JSON object. No markdown. No explanation. No intro text. Start with { and end with }.

Use exactly this structure:
{
  "meeting_summary": "2-3 sentence executive summary",
  "action_items": [
    {
      "task": "specific task description",
      "owner_name": "full name",
      "owner_email": "email address",
      "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "priority": "critical|high|medium|low",
      "depends_on": "dependency description or null"
    }
  ],
  "decisions": ["decision 1", "decision 2"],
  "blockers": [
    {
      "description": "what is blocked",
      "owner": "who resolves it",
      "is_recurring": true,
      "occurrences": 3
    }
  ],
  "follow_up_meeting": {
    "title": "meeting title",
    "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "time": "09:00",
    "duration_minutes": 60,
    "attendees": ["email1", "email2"],
    "agenda": "one sentence agenda"
  },
  "external_participants_detected": true,
  "external_participants": ["Name (Company)"],
  "risk_flags": ["risk description"]
}

parameters.name: check_blocker_history
parameters.description: Checks the meeting history database for recurring blockers. Call this for each blocker or delay mentioned in the meeting. Pass a JSON object with 'topic' (string) describing the blocker.

parameters.name: schedule_followup_meeting
parameters.description: Schedules a follow-up meeting. Call this when the transcript confirms a follow-up is needed. Pass JSON with: title, date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (HH:MM), duration_minutes, attendees (array of emails), agenda.

parameters.name: send_action_email
parameters.description: Sends a personalised action item email. Call once per unique owner. Pass JSON with: recipient_name, recipient_email, task, deadline, priority, meeting_title, follow_up_date.

assignments.name: instructions
assignments.value: Open resume_url in your browser to APPROVE. Open reject_url to REJECT.

assignments.name: actions_taken
assignments.value:
✅ Minutes distributed to all participants
✅ Action emails sent to all owners
✅ Follow-up meeting scheduled in Teams
✅ External participants notified with approved summary

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Human reviewer rejected distribution. Minutes saved as draft. Manual review required before sending to external participants.

assignments.name: next_action
assignments.value: Edit minutes manually and re-trigger when ready.

assignments.name: actions_taken
assignments.value:
✅ Minutes auto-distributed (internal — no approval needed)
✅ Action emails sent to all owners
✅ Follow-up meeting scheduled in Teams
✅ Blocker history updated
